channels.name: in-home-help-field-officers
channels.purpose: AI-assisted back-office for field staff — post questions about visits, care plans, scheduling. The LangGraph bot replies with grounded answers.

channels.name: in-home-help-customer-support
channels.purpose: AI-assisted back-office for customer support agents — dispute resolution, member lookup, policy questions. The LangGraph bot replies with cited answers.

channels.name: in-home-help-product-owners
channels.purpose: AI-assisted channel for product owners — metrics, feature requests, ops questions. The LangGraph bot pulls from dashboards and documentation.

channels.name: in-home-help-customers
channels.purpose: AI-assisted channel for member/customer inquiries — appointment status, visit history, care plan questions. The LangGraph bot replies with grounded answers from the member record.
